themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in public services and welfare. This theme is prominently featured in Spain (Vox), Italy (Fratelli d'Italia/Lega), and France (Rassemblement National), with parallel debates in local and regional governments.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox applies 'national priority' in Valencia, Andalusia, and other regions, demanding aid and services be restricted to Spanish citizens.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega candidates in Vigevano face backlash for including Muslim candidates, highlighting tensions over national identity and integration.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella emphasizes national sovereignty in debates over immigration and public services, aligning with Vox's rhetoric.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK campaigns on restricting immigration and prioritizing British citizens in public services, mirroring continental trends.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD pushes for policies favoring German citizens in welfare and housing, echoing 'national priority' themes.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump’s administration continues to shape right-wing discourse worldwide, with his policies on Iran, immigration, and economic nationalism resonating in Europe. Coverage spans the U.S., UK, Spain, Italy, and France, reflecting his influence on transnational right-wing agendas.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump’s Iran policies, tariff decisions, and executive orders on retirement accounts dominate U.S. right-wing media.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK aligns with Trump’s anti-immigration stance, criticizing UK leadership for failing to adopt similar policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox echoes Trump’s rhetoric on immigration and economic nationalism, particularly in Andalusia’s election campaign.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing media covers Trump’s foreign policy, including his stance on Iran and relations with Europe.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: French right-wing media highlights Trump’s influence on global right-wing movements, particularly on immigration and trade.

themes.title: Hungary’s political shift under new leadership
themes.blurb: Hungary’s political landscape is undergoing a seismic shift following the election of Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party, which has ended Viktor Orbán’s 16-year rule. This transition is closely watched in Poland, Germany, and the U.S., where Orbán’s legacy and Magyar’s reforms are debated.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Magyar’s Tisza Party forms a new government, dismantling Orbán’s legacy and promising reforms on corruption and EU relations.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media analyzes Hungary’s shift, drawing parallels to PiS’s own internal struggles and potential electoral consequences.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: German right-wing media discusses Hungary’s political transition, comparing Magyar’s rise to AfD’s own challenges.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: U.S. right-wing media covers Hungary’s shift, speculating on its impact on transatlantic relations and Trump’s foreign policy.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric is increasingly linked to political violence, with incidents reported in the U.S., UK, Italy, and Spain. This theme explores how inflammatory language and extremist ideologies are contributing to a rise in threats and attacks against political opponents and minorities.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega candidates face backlash for anti-immigrant rhetoric, with protests and threats reported in Vigevano.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK members face assault allegations during protests, with far-right rhetoric cited as a contributing factor.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump’s rhetoric is linked to threats and violence, including an assassination attempt and FBI investigations into online threats.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox’s anti-immigration rhetoric sparks protests and accusations of inciting violence against minorities.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are gaining ground in polls across Europe, with significant surges reported in Germany (AfD), France (Rassemblement National), Sweden (Sverigedemokraterna), and the UK (Reform UK). This theme captures the transnational momentum of far-right movements ahead of key elections.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads polls in Saxony-Anhalt and Berlin, with strong grassroots mobilization and rising support.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN gains traction in French polls, with Jordan Bardella positioning himself as a key figure for the 2027 presidential election.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD breaks parliamentary norms to push stricter citizenship laws, reflecting its growing influence in Sweden.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK eyes gains in UK local elections, targeting Labour strongholds with anti-immigration and anti-net zero policies.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP gains in Norwegian polls, focusing on immigration and economic policies ahead of local elections.
